title: Preparing the Merry for the Sky
description: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Time for food! Hurry up, USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Nami... Am I a pathetic coward?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Just make sure to apologize properly.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: AGHH! Don't get your shot on me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heh, I'm still well within my limit.

summary: The crew searches Jaya’s forest for the South Bird, a strange creature needed to navigate toward the Knock Up Stream.
